sql: WITH top_districts AS (SELECT district_id, A2 AS district_name FROM district ORDER BY CAST(A4 AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 5), quarterly AS (SELECT td.district_name, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS quarter, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS trans_count FROM top_districts td JOIN account a ON a.district_id=td.district_id JOIN trans t ON t.account_id=a.account_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE))=1997 GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT * FROM quarterly ORDER BY district_name, quarter; WITH top_districts AS (SELECT district_id, A2 AS district_name FROM district ORDER BY CAST(A4 AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT td.district_name, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS quarter, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount FROM top_districts td JOIN account a ON a.district_id=td.district_id JOIN trans t ON t.account_id=a.account_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE))=1997 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2,1;
